description: 用于钟表时间和具体时刻。
examples_json: [{"en":"The meeting starts at 3 PM.","zh":"会议下午3点开始。"}]

description: 用于月份/年份/季节/一天中的某部分。
examples_json: [{"en":"I was born in March.","zh":"我出生在三月。"}]

description: 用于星期几和具体日期。

examples_json: [{"en":"He fell asleep during the movie.","zh":"他在看电影时睡着了。"}]

description: 从过去某时间点开始(持续到现)。
examples_json: [{"en":"I've been here since 9 AM.","zh":"我从早上9点就在这里了。"}]

description: 表示动作持续多长时间。
examples_json: [{"en":"I studied for three hours.","zh":"我学习了三个小时。"}]
[{"en":"The store is open until 9 PM.","zh":"商店营业到晚上9点。"}]
[{"en":"Please finish by Friday.","zh":"请在周五前完成。"}]
[{"en":"Wash your hands before you eat.","zh":"吃饭前洗手。"}]
[{"en":"We went out after dinner.","zh":"晚饭后我们出去了。"}]
[{"en":"First mix the flour and eggs.","zh":"首先混合面粉和鸡蛋。"}]
[{"en":"First shower then get dressed.","zh":"先洗澡然后穿衣服。"}]
[{"en":"When she arrived we had dinner.","zh":"她到的时候我们正在吃晚饭。"}]

description: 表示两个持续动作同时进行。
examples_json: [{"en":"She listened to music while studying.","zh":"她学习时听音乐。"}]

description: 表示两个动作同步发生。
examples_json: [{"en":"As I got older I changed.","zh":"随着年龄增长我变了。"}]
